text.title: Small Team Comms Rhythm Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping team_size + ritual_count + sync_duration + founder_only to run / repair / graduate.

conclusion.verdict: graduate: retire this methodology; adopt formal PM / agile framework
repair: collapse extra rituals OR add missing; reject 4th recurring meeting

branch.when: team_size_out_of_range == false AND ritual_count_invalid == false AND daily_sync == true

conclusion.verdict: repair: convert daily standup to async text thread; do not run synchronous daily

branch.when: team_size_out_of_range == false AND ritual_count_invalid == false AND daily_sync == false AND sync_too_long_or_agendaless == true

conclusion.verdict: repair: cap weekly at 30 min; require 24h agenda; postpone if missing

branch.when: team_size_out_of_range == false AND ritual_count_invalid == false AND daily_sync == false AND sync_too_long_or_agendaless == false AND founder_only_true == true

conclusion.verdict: repair: every participant produces own pulse; founder one voice among 2-3

branch.when: team_size_out_of_range == false AND ritual_count_invalid == false AND daily_sync == false AND sync_too_long_or_agendaless == false AND founder_only_true == false

conclusion.verdict: run: continue rhythm; check graduation in next monthly check
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: size=2 → 3 rituals → async daily → weekly 30 min with agenda → not founder-only → run.
